data.title: Skeena Resources Limited files C$125 million bought deal financing prospectus supplement, available on SEDAR.
data.description: The Base Shelf Prospectus and the Prospectus Supplement can be found on SEDAR. This disclosure can be accessed by the public for reviewing important information related to the company's financial prospectus.

data.title: Energy Fuels closes US$700M Convertible Senior Notes offering with additional notes purchased.
data.description: Energy Fuels Inc. (NYSE: UUUU) (TSX: EFR) disclosed on Oct. 3, 2025, the successful completion of an increased offering of 0.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The company confirmed the closing of the upsized offering, with the Notes valued at an aggregate principal amount of US$700.0 million.

data.title: SACH Pte. Ltd. merges with Quantumsphere Acquisition Corporation to list on NASDAQ; creates new entity.
data.description: The merger of two companies is anticipated to result in the newly combined company being listed on the NASDAQ Global Market. This move is expected to enhance the visibility and market presence of the merged entity. The NASDAQ Global Market is a prominent stock exchange that features over 2,500 listings and boasts a total market capitalization exceeding $10 trillion. Trading on this platform offers companies exposure to a broad investor base and increased liquidity for their shares. The decision to list on the NASDAQ Global Market underscores the combined company's ambition for growth and success in the competitive marketplace.

data.title: Texas aviation startup AirProtect receives backing from SouthernPlex Group to revolutionize aircraft care services. Filing for AirProtect Group, Inc. announced on Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: SouthernPlex Group has pledged support to AirProtect, LLC to enhance private aircraft care through asset protection services. The announcement was made in Fort Worth, Texas, on October 3, 2025. SouthernPlex has filed for AirProtect Group, Inc. to aid in revolutionizing the aircraft industry. This backing is expected to bring about significant changes in the sector, with key figures including investment amounts yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Fluence leads industry discussion on cannabis cultivation & technology at PhotoX 2025 event bringing global experts together.
data.description: Austin, Texas, and Eindhoven, Netherlands - Fluence hosts PhotoX 2025, gathering global experts to discuss the future of cannabis cultivation and technology.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market cap surpasses $4.21T, Bitcoin hits $124,000 with US demand, Fed policy changes boosting Q4 investor optimism.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin surged to nearly $124,000 driven by increasing demand in the US, changes in Federal Reserve policy, and positive expectations for a strong fourth quarter. Investors were buoyed by these factors, leading to a significant rally in the cryptocurrency market.

data.description: Discover which high-performing stocks such as Credo Technology have recently secured a place in Investor's Business Daily's compilation of top growth stocks. data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This change represents a total of 500,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the quarter has been revised to 6.2%, which is a significant increase from the previous estimate. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening of the economy and job market in the current scenario.

data.title: IEQ Capital opens new office at 525 Market St, San Francisco, making it the third Bay Area location.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, IEQ Capital revealed the inauguration of a new branch at 525 Market Street in San Francisco, CA, becoming their third office in the Bay Area. This development supplements IEQ's main office in Foster City and the debut of another office in the region.
